display.name: Claude Code Metrics
display.description: Monitor Claude Code usage, costs, tokens, and productivity metrics

display.name: Active Time
display.description: Total active time in Claude Code (seconds)

display.name: API Cost (Total)
display.description: Total hypothetical API cost for selected window

spec.name: A
spec.query: SELECT sum(value) as value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'claude_code.cost.usage' AND unix_milli >= {{.start_timestamp_ms}} AND unix_milli <= {{.end_timestamp_ms}}

display.name: Recent API Calls
display.description: Recent API calls with cost

display.name: Cache Efficiency %
display.description: Percentage of tokens served from cache

display.name: CLI vs User Time
display.description: Time spent by Claude (CLI) vs waiting for user input

display.name: Commits
display.description: Git commits created

display.name: Cost by Model
display.description: Cost breakdown by model

display.name: Cost Leverage
display.description: API cost / Max plan cost. >1 = saving money.

spec.name: A
spec.query: SELECT sum(value) / (({{.end_timestamp_ms}} - {{.start_timestamp_ms}}) / 1000 * 0.0000760531) as value FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'claude_code.cost.usage' AND unix_milli >= {{.start_timestamp_ms}} AND unix_milli <= {{.end_timestamp_ms}}

display.name: Cost Over Time (USD)
display.description: Cost accumulation over time

display.name: Cost Leverage Over Time
display.description: Rolling cost leverage at 1m, 5m, and 15m windows

display.name: Lines Changed
display.description: Lines of code modified

display.name: Usage Leverage
display.description: CLI:User time ratio (e.g. 350 = Claude worked 350x more)

display.name: Leverage Over Time
display.description: Rolling CLI:User ratio at 1m, 5m, and 15m windows

display.name: PRs
display.description: Pull requests created

display.name: Sessions
display.description: Number of Claude Code sessions

display.name: Tokens by Model
display.description: Token consumption by model

display.name: Tokens by Type
display.description: Input, output, cache read, cache creation

display.name: Token Usage Over Time
display.description: Total tokens consumed over time

display.name: Tool Calls
display.description: Accept/reject decisions for code edits

display.name: Tool Success
display.description: Success vs failure rate

display.name: Tool Usage Frequency
display.description: Which tools are used most often
